title: linum angustifolium var. cribrosum
intro: Linum angustifolium var. cribrosum, also known as the Canadian flax or purple flax, is a flowering plant species native to North America. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of linoleic acid, an omega-6 fatty acid, and other flavonoids. The health benefits of Linum angustifolium var. cribrosum include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular protective effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as high blood pressure, arthritis, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and oils, which can be used topically or ingested in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
